description_long: This object is a classic Sony PlayStation CD player console, featuring a rectangular, light gray plastic body with rounded edges and a circular disc tray at the center of the top surface. The front face displays two controller ports and a memory card slot, while the rear side includes a port for AV and power connections. The top surface is adorned with the PlayStation logo and has three distinct circular buttons: power, reset, and open, each slightly raised and color-accented. The sides are ribbed for ventilation, and the overall design is compact and low-profile, typical of late 1990s consumer electronics. The object is primarily constructed from molded plastic with internal metal components and electronic circuitry, and it is designed to rest on flat surfaces such as tables or shelves.
description: A compact, light gray Sony PlayStation CD player console with a central disc tray, front controller ports, and three circular control buttons on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing two controller ports, memory card slots, and the PlayStation logo on the disc tray.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ribbed ventilation and the circular control buttons on the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the AV and power connection ports, with a smooth, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with ribbed ventilation and a clear view of the top control buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: PlayStation logo with colored PS symbol
